name: useProgress
description: Hook that creates a lightweight progress bar
examples: const { value, active, start, done, inc, set, remove } = useProgress(0.2);

parameters.name: options.active
parameters.description: Controls progress externally (true -> start, false -> done)

source.source: * @param {boolean} [options.active] Controls progress externally (true -> start, false -> done)

tokens.name: [options.active]
tokens.description: Controls progress externally (true -> start, false -> done)

parameters.name: options.rate
parameters.description: Additional random increment amount on each tick

source.source: * @param {number} [options.rate=0.02] Additional random increment amount on each tick

tokens.name: [options.rate=0.02]
tokens.description: Additional random increment amount on each tick

parameters.name: options.delay
parameters.description: Delay before reset to null after done

source.source: * @param {number} [options.delay=250] Delay before reset to null after done

tokens.name: [options.delay=250]
tokens.description: Delay before reset to null after done

source.source: * @returns {UseProgressReturn} Current progress state and control methods
